sous_titres.text: They'll want to know how we found our heroes
you'll have to tell them how it was before.
You're too young to remember how green the world was,
It was men who fought first, because that's what men do.
So our mothers, our wives, our daughters, our sisters,
and made sure this was a war we could not lose.
Sometimes they come from space, sometimes from underground.
But death is always followed by rebirth.
When that first Stitch opened 15 years ago,
this age old cycle started again.
You see, the Stitch was always there.
Mother Earth had just buried it deep,
to protect her most cherished creations.
opened up the Stitch and let all the Breakers out.
just who is telling the story here?
-Okay, well, you've told this story a million times, Dad.
- Well, you heard one this morning, so sshh.
The destruction of the boreal forests--
This is the story of how Kodiak
with one swipe of his mighty ax.
It was just a year after the Stitch had opened
and our brave forces were gathered in Glasgow
The nights were long and wet and windy.
The only thing that kept them going were these stories.
- Out in the dark, in the wet.
- He tells me these things not to scare me,
but to remind me that one day,
away from all this darkness and death and destruction...
- And that morning... - and found the light.
It sounds closer than it really is.
-Will you have to go away again?
Return to your blocks and await further instructions.
-Well, it'll be cold there. She'll need it.
- Where are we going? - Okay, my turn.
I know you're not my wee Willa Gorilla anymore--
-Yes, but seeing that you've never had a real one,
-Oh, you're so cute. I love him.
Helen Travis on the 9 Bloc makes them.
You know, we've got 15 veterans in this Bloc alone.
You get one bite, even a single scratch-
No matter how badass you may be.
- Oh, s o now you think I'm a badass?
is dead. Well, that's it, then.
- Make your way to the last truck now.
- How close are they? - Eight clicks north.
-Are there any Hybrids? -Of course there's Hybrids.
And if you don't get your ass in there fast,
you're gonna become one. Go on!
Go! Come on! Go, go, go!
- This one's going to Mercy Bay, right?
I need to ride in the front, lead the convoy.
I'll see you when you get there. Okay?
-Dad, where are we-- -Someplace safe. Come on.
-Listen up. I don't care who your wife is.
You so much as sneeze, you so much as cough...
-I've seen it happen. If it happens to me,
I will pull the trigger myself.
-You know why dudes can turn and not us?
-'Cause we don't have time for that shit?
No matter how badass you think you are.
The infection burns them out quick.
Our synapses are like webs that stretch clear
and cross each other multiple times.
He's killed over a hundred Breakers.
I heard he's part Breaker himself.
-A hundred Breakers? I heard it was 300.
- Look at the bloody heraldry. - You're wrong.
The bear is how he got the name.
He raised it from a cub he found in Anchorage.
-If I had a pound for every man
who said they'd fought with Kodiak.
-I heard nobody got out of that one unscathed.
Bear or no bear, he still fights like one.
We'll be there soon, my love.
On the left! On the left! Go!
- Come with me. Get down, get down.
Get up. Get up. Get up.
That was the last of them.
-They were on us before we could react.
Get everyone off the road into the forest.
- Get out of the road into the forest.
I'll stay with you till it's over.
Oh, it's okay. It's human, not Breaker.
- No, there's no point. It'll slow 'em down at best.
We're gonna make it through this.
You can be afraid but you can't let it stop you.
Let what scares you move you forward.
-I have to stay. I have to fight.
-You said we were going. You said we had to go.
Remember the stories I told you?
Back in the day before you were born,
when Mom and I would go fishing?
- You mean when there were fish?
I thought you made those up.
We could still take a couple of those people with us.
-Willa, this is our path. You and me.
We cannot think about anyone else right now, okay?
We're just checking it, looking for food.
- And you're going to get me out of here.
Come on. Get it in the water.
-Okay, we're just not gonna go very far without petrol.
You don't think I'd leave it here with a tank
full of gas, d'you? For someone to steal?
-It's in the boot of one of the cars around the corner.
-Willa, stay here. Just stay here. Okay?
-What it means it's just only us gets hit?
Not our wives, not our mothers, not our daughters.
-Well, women have turned. It's male biology.
The world wanted revenge, and it knew who to blame.
Some things you just can't wash off.
- He got scared. He ran off.
Do you want to get some breakfast?
It's not so bad having just one.
Not just tinned beans and scraps from the garden.
-I told you that climb is too risky.
- Now, don't get cocky, young lady.
We'll eat them when I'm done.
Put some wood on the fire.
The dry stuff: the wet stuff is too smoky.
-Why don't you let me split the wood sometimes?
I mean, I can swing an ax like Kodiak
taking off a Breaker's head, unlike you.
Show me how you swing that sword.
You win, I'll let you split the rest.
when you first approached me head on like that?
I feinted, you passed and I came in from behind
and gave myself the advantage. Understand?
-Good. Don't worry, I'll carve you another.
Bring some of this firewood in, okay?
-I like the way that she did it.
- No. I had to learn by watching her do it.
Just like you're learning watching me...
to hunt, to run, to climb, to fight.
And when this war is over, you'll get to learn the rest.
-How will she know what I look like now?
She could pass me on the street and she wouldn't recognize me.
-Looks just like how she did it.
Just one story, and then we eat.
This is the story of when
for the long, cold winter ahead.
Now remember, for Kodiak, gathering firewood
is not like what we do, picking up sticks and driftwood.
He could take down an entire tree with his ax,
And with every blow of that mighty ax,
He carved the handle from an English oak
forged it from steel from an old Welsh mining ground.
The day he was heading back to his camp...
He was the first to see it. The Stitch.
And he took out a hundred Breakers
with one swipe of his mighty ax.
Many more came after, we know that.
and this is how we learned that to kill 'em, you have...
Decap. Only way to do it.
It slows them down, but it doesn't kill them.
-When I fought, we would go into battle
knowing there was a giant out there with an ax
made of lightning slicing through Breakers
like a hot knife through butter.
if he could save this world from breaking--
We need to keep telling them how the Stitch opened,
how the first Breakers came, then the Hybrids,
and how we stood tall, how we fought back,
And one day, when this world is bright
-Because when I look at you, I'm reminded.
- You said there used to be bunnies out here.
No, she doesn't have fur like you!
But they have other senses, ones we don't have.
well, the Breakers use them as their eyes and ears,
kind of like they're connected somehow, you know?
-But they don't know we're here, right?
-If they did, my love, we wouldn't be on this island.
-Why do they want to hurt us
if we didn't do anything to them?
trying to invade their ant hill?
They think we're like the wasp trying to invade their home
So we'd better be ready to fight for it.
Are you ready to fight, maggot?
What do you do when you hear my horn?
Which direction is the cottage from the White Cliffs?
They're coming for your little doggy.
Which direction to the Boat Cove!?
I just assumed they died out with everything else.
Used to be a lot more of them, back in the old days.
when we got married just before you were born,
all she wanted for the wedding party
- It's a yellow cake, sweet whipped cream,
She ate the whole damn cake.
She is the life of the party.
How do you kill a Breaker, Bear?
I told you, you need to cut off the head.
I can't believe he doesn't think I'm ready yet.
he just thinks that I can't do what he did to that man,
but I could fight if I had to...
Okay, just don't move and take a step back, okay?
-Do you want to tell me what happened?
No, no, no, no, no. It's fine.
Um...uh...uh, no. Okay, you know what?
I'm gonna take you someplace warm, okay?
Just take my hand, and let's get you inside.
-I must've hit my head on the boat.
-We were headed up the coast to my grandma's house.
My dad, brother, we all went in the water.
We didn't know they could swim,
-When's the last time you ate, Rosie?
Okay, um...this is what I have left.
I'm gonna go and get you some real food, okay?
Okay, all you have to do is make sure the fire keeps going.
All you have to do is put a log on,
I'll stay... for a little longer.
-We don't have much time. Let's go.
- We need to go now. There's no time.
No matter how badass we may be.
I blew the horn. Didn't you hear it?
-I was...I fell asleep in the Pine Grove
-Sit down. I'll make you some food.
We are living on fumes, Willa.
We have to be careful. We have to be smart.
it was that man's, wasn't it?
We left everyone behind that night we came here.
-Didn't have a choice. Not that night.
But she chose to leave us.
-Mom had to leave to save the world,
and I had to save you.
bad because you can turn and we can't?
And girls can turn too, remember?
if it comes to it, you will too.
-If they threatened you or Mom in any way?
You need to eat some soup.
I don't have many of those.
I just come here sometimes to get away.
-Um...Hey, do you want to see something?
-This is what the world used to look like
My dad said these were called fish.
They sort of look like Breakers.
My mom said there were flowers back then.
The world was bright and beautiful.
-I miss my dad... and my brother.
They're probably out there right now, looking for you.
-He's a dog, but I call him Bear
and he could do all the things they say,
-He can't do it on his own.
This is the story about Kodiak
and the first battle with Breakers.
It was after the first Stitch opened,
and already Kodiak was a leader among men.
Kodiak and the men slayed every single Breaker
-Yeah, and he told us how to do it.
He's out there, fighting for us and with us.
And together, we're gonna close that Stitch
and the world won't be broken anymore.
You'll see. Okay. I'm gonna go.
I'll be back soon with some more food.
Um...this is for you, to keep you warm.
I tag you. They tag you.
They tag you, it's not mud.
Hiding won't save you, little pig.
Give me my stick, will you?
I'll warm you up some soup, okay?
You're not eating so I can eat.
Then you would have kept me here for what?
Swinging a bat and wooden sword?
You won't even let me fight.
-I am not just training you to fight, Willa.
We stay here and do nothing
whilst out there Mom does every--
And your mother is still out there fighting.
Don't ever say we did nothing.
I wouldn't give this to you until you were ready.
Tomorrow, I will show you how to fight like she does.
I'm gonna go check the rabbit snares.
Rosie, why would you do this to Bear?
Let's go. Let's go. Come on.
Let's just stop here for the night.
-What did I do? What did I do?
- Willa... - She was just a girl.
It called out to them. It signaled them.
You remember what I told you, the Breakers and the Hybrids,
They know we are here now, so we leave.
Hey. This is what you trained for, Willa.
and they will destroy everything here
We're on the wrong side of the island.
We've got a long hike up and over to the other side.
- You never told me they could swim.
When they sense prey, nothing's gonna stop them.
They'll have to come ashore on the beach
The mines can slow them down a bit.
Give us time to get to the cove.

it means we don't have a lot of time.
-When we get to the boat, where are we gonna go?
Keep the mainland to the left,
Once we're through the Pine Forest,
it's another five minutes downhill to the cove.
I was just trying to help.
God, this is all my fault.
none of it is your fault, you understand?
-And what happened to that girl wasn't her fault either.
Here. Eat this. It'll keep you warm.
What have you done with my daughter?
-That's why you need to tell them.
-Already there were rumors about the awful things
by an enemy we did not yet understand.
But we didn't care about any of it.
I'd never met anyone with so much light.
We knew that no matter what should come...
and we couldn't wait to bring you into this world.
this little lamb so full of trust and wonder,
You told me it was going to be hard.
Would've been nice if you'd told me how hard.
I know that you're out there
and I know that you're coming back.
Please. If you can, make it soon.
You think Kodiak's the only one who can chop down a tree
The Breakers aren't big enough to get across this.
They'll have to go around, which should buy us a few minutes,
unless we can't get over it.
You've done this a million times.
Stay steady. Focus on the front.

-It's their father. You really gotta get up now.

This is what you trained for.
-Do you remember how to prime and start the motor

- You cut the mooring rope. There's just one swipe.
It should slide down on its own.
You won't even need to push it.
-I will give you as much time as I can
so you can get to the boat and go.
-No, I can stay and I'm gonna fight with you.
You have already proved that to me.
-Let me do this for you, please.
So you fight, but don't forget to love.
You love it all, even the darkness.
who was strong, full of hope and fear.

The hero who gives all of us hope.
